##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/edit-budget-parent-plan 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/edit-budget-parent-plan 
 ## 接口描述 
本接口适用于单条修改预算方案信息
调用本接口后可在“智能费控-系统设置-预算设置-预算方案“中查看修改后的预算方案信息。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"allowExternalSystemBill","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E5%A4%96%E9%83%A8%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200-%E4%B8%8D%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%0A1-%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"allowMonthOrderBudgetOccupy","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%9C%88%E7%BB%93%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200-%E4%B8%8D%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%0A1-%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetApproveTime","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"NONE","desc":"%20NONE-%E4%B8%8D%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%0A%0AWHEN_INIT-%E6%9C%9F%E5%88%9D%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E9%9C%80%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%0A%0AWHEN_MODIFY-%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E8%BF%BD%E5%8A%A0%E8%B0%83%E6%95%B4%E9%9C%80%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%0A%0AANYTIME-%E6%9C%9F%E5%88%9D%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%2F%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E8%BF%BD%E5%8A%A0%E8%B0%83%E6%95%B4%E5%9D%87%E9%9C%80%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetEndDate","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2025-12-31","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAyyyy-MM-dd","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5","desc":"","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"budgetOrgs","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B1%2C2%2C3%5D","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94100%E4%B8%AA%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%0A%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E4%B8%8D%E5%A1%AB%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%89%80%E6%9C%89%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87","maxLength":"100"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetStartDate","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2025-01-01","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAyyyy-MM-dd","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"budgetSubs","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B1%2C2%2C3%5D","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94100%E4%B8%AA%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%0A%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E4%B8%8D%E5%A1%AB%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%89%80%E6%9C%89%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE","maxLength":"100"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"eventIds","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E7%9A%84%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B1%2C2%2C3%5D","desc":"%20%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94100%E4%B8%AA%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%0A%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E4%B8%8D%E5%A1%AB%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E6%89%80%E6%9C%89%E7%9A%84%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95","maxLength":"100"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"needPostAccount","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%BF%87%E8%B4%A6%E5%90%8E%E7%94%9F%E6%95%88","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%200-%E6%97%A0%E9%9C%80%E8%BF%87%E8%B4%A6%0A1-%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E8%BF%87%E8%B4%A6%0A%E8%8B%A5%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE%E8%BF%87%E8%B4%A6%E5%90%8E%E7%94%9F%E6%95%88%EF%BC%8C%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E5%8D%95%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%E5%90%8E%E9%9C%80%E7%82%B9%E5%87%BB%E8%BF%87%E8%B4%A6%E5%90%8E%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%89%8D%E8%83%BD%E7%94%9F%E6%95%88%0A%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E4%B8%BANONE%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE%E6%97%A0%E9%9C%80%E8%BF%87%E8%B4%A6-0","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"opsEmpNumber","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"001","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"budgetParentPlanSeqId","required":true,"maxLength":"20","label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","exampleValue":"100","desc":"%20%E6%A0%B9%E6%8D%AE%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E8%BF%9B%E8%A1%8C%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":"%20SUC0000-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0AE0001-%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%0AE0002-%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0D%0Afalse%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":"","maxLength":"500"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
    "budgetParentPlanSeqId":100,
    "allowExternalSystemBill": "0",
    "allowMonthOrderBudgetOccupy": "0",
    "budgetApproveTime": "NONE",
    "budgetEndDate": "2026-12-31",
    "budgetName": "测试预算方案导入1",
    "budgetOrgs": [1],
    "budgetStartDate": "2024-01-01",
    "budgetSubs": [1],
    "eventIds": [1],
    "needPostAccount": "0",
    "opsEmpNumber": "001"
}
```
### 更新成功的响应报文
```json
{
    "body": "",
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
```
### 更新失败的响应报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例
```json
{
    "returnCode": "E0001",
    "success": false,
    "message": "业务错误: 预算方案不存在，请检查后重试！"
}
```
### 接口调用失败的报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例
```json
{
    "code": "E0002",
    "message": "预算方案自增ID不能为空;"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
sucess为更新成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败
| 常见报错|
| --- |
| 正在进行预算额度导入任务，请稍后再试|
| 预算方案不存在，请检查后重试！|
| 预算方案配置了固定区间，不允许修改预算期间，请检查|
| 该方案下还有待审批的预算，暂不能修改审批设置|
| 当前预算方案日期设置错误，请检查|
| 预算组织在同一时间不能配置于多个方案|
| 预算科目在同一时间不能配置于多个方案|
| 预算组织科目在同一时间不能配置于多个方案|
| 预算区间只支持扩大，不允许缩短|
|已经有预算发生额，预算区间只能向后扩展|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/edit-budget-parent-plan

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/edit-budget-parent-plan

接口描述

本接口适用于单条修改预算方案信息 调用本接口后可在“智能费控-系统设置-预算设置-预算方案“中查看修改后的预算方案信息。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

接口调用示例

请求报文

{
    "budgetParentPlanSeqId":100,
    "allowExternalSystemBill": "0",
    "allowMonthOrderBudgetOccupy": "0",
    "budgetApproveTime": "NONE",
    "budgetEndDate": "2026-12-31",
    "budgetName": "测试预算方案导入1",
    "budgetOrgs": [1],
    "budgetStartDate": "2024-01-01",
    "budgetSubs": [1],
    "eventIds": [1],
    "needPostAccount": "0",

}

更新成功的响应报文

{
    "body": "",
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}

更新失败的响应报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例

{
    "returnCode": "E0001",
    "success": false,
    "message": "业务错误: 预算方案不存在，请检查后重试！"
}

接口调用失败的报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例

{
    "code": "E0002",
    "message": "预算方案自增ID不能为空;"
}

错误码说明

sucess为更新成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败

常见报错
正在进行预算额度导入任务，请稍后再试
预算方案不存在，请检查后重试！
预算方案配置了固定区间，不允许修改预算期间，请检查
该方案下还有待审批的预算，暂不能修改审批设置
当前预算方案日期设置错误，请检查
预算组织在同一时间不能配置于多个方案
预算科目在同一时间不能配置于多个方案
预算组织科目在同一时间不能配置于多个方案
预算区间只支持扩大，不允许缩短
已经有预算发生额，预算区间只能向后扩展
